Sections to add pictures

* **You don't have to…**  
  * Use this [picture](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1qaHZkGOhT_kf9VXK9R2RijaabHlsJyTc/view?usp=sharing) on one side and the three pain points on the other side. So maybe they grey boxes will be more vertical or wider and they are on top of each other instead of side by side  
      
* As a member of Flow in Faith Teachers Collective  
  * Above this section add the Teachers Collective [logo](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1bgWkz72CmdycolU-7OoYhEzM7pdr_uyW/view?usp=drive_link)  
  * Use pictures as [benefit headers](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/11SbVZrd1KL8hj4bAAo9HSqxKlhDfIEva?usp=drive_link)  
    * Example (without the Explore buttons)

![][image1]

* **After Premium Opportunities**  
  * Use this [Membership comparison chart](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1MXoadJhxMkm9gF4W-sTwWr_97MFHq-qc/view?usp=sharing)

* **Imagine what it would feel like to…**  
  * Put pics at the top of each grey box  
    * [1](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1MXoadJhxMkm9gF4W-sTwWr_97MFHq-qc/view?usp=sharing), [2](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KabfoG3RA_7BUSgXuja2aR-EWxNnYGT4/view?usp=sharing), [3](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NICrk_bB4o5G8xlLpUoCoVkPkCt-ugT8/view?usp=sharing), [4](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1eslTyrh5qLSyqdAxZSYLoc4oBhr4Xcms/view?usp=sharing)

**Alignment Form Page**

Add [image](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gCUukx0qLgZW6q74beucS7TWHAYQf69t/view?usp=sharing) at top  
   
**Change Application to Alignment Form**

Add Text:   
These questions help us understand your story, your season and how the Collective can best support you. 

**There are no right or wrong answers**

We are not accessing theology, teaching ability, or productivity. 

We are listening for alignment, clarity, and care.

You will be directed to purchase your membership option after completing the Alignment Form.

**Checkout Form Page**  
Keep [image](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gCUukx0qLgZW6q74beucS7TWHAYQf69t/view?usp=sharing) at top
